top3.sql:
SELECT a.atom_id, COUNT(DISTINCT b.bond_type) AS bond_type_count
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR346'
GROUP BY a.atom_id;

SELECT a.atom_id, COUNT(DISTINCT b.bond_type) AS bond_type_count
FROM atom a
JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE a.molecule_id = (SELECT molecule_id FROM molecule WHERE label = 'TR346')
GROUP BY a.atom_id;

SELECT a.atom_id, COUNT(DISTINCT b.bond_type) AS bond_type_count
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR346'
GROUP BY a.atom_id;

SELECT a.atom_id, 
       (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b2.bond_type) 
        FROM bond b2 
        WHERE b2.molecule_id = m.molecule_id) AS bond_type_count
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR346';

SELECT a.atom_id, 
       (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b2.bond_type) 
        FROM bond b2 
        WHERE b2.molecule_id = a.molecule_id) AS bond_type_count
FROM atom a
WHERE a.molecule_id = (SELECT molecule_id FROM molecule WHERE label = 'TR346');

SELECT a.atom_id, COUNT(DISTINCT b.bond_type) AS bond_type_count
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR346'
GROUP BY a.atom_id;

SELECT a.atom_id, 
       (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b2.bond_type) 
        FROM bond b2 
        WHERE b2.molecule_id = m.molecule_id) AS bond_type_count
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR346';

SELECT a.atom_id, 
       (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b2.bond_type) 
        FROM bond b2 
        WHERE b2.molecule_id = a.molecule_id) AS bond_type_count
FROM atom a
WHERE a.molecule_id = (SELECT molecule_id FROM molecule WHERE label = 'TR346');

final.sql:
SELECT a.atom_id, COUNT(DISTINCT b.bond_type) AS bond_type_count
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR346'
GROUP BY a.atom_id;

top_error_messages.message_head: DISTINCT is not supported for window functions
